blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,088 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 41".
